# Inferential Statistics {#sec-ch-04-inferential}

Classical inference: the Central Limit Theorem, MLE, NHST and its philosophy, t-tests and proportions, goodness-of-fit, correlation, and the non-parametric counterparts. This is the largest chapter and the one most peer reviewers will read first.

This chapter contains **45 method pages** and **9 labs**. If you are not sure which method to read, return to [Chapter 0](../../ch00-find-your-method.Rmd) and follow the decision tree to the right node.

## Method pages

| Method | Source slug |
|---|---|
| [Anderson-Darling Test](anderson-darling-test.Rmd) | `anderson-darling-test` |
| [Bartlett's Test](bartlett-test.Rmd) | `bartlett-test` |
| [Benjamini-Hochberg FDR](benjamini-hochberg-fdr.Rmd) | `benjamini-hochberg-fdr` |
| [Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR](benjamini-yekutieli.Rmd) | `benjamini-yekutieli` |
| [Bonferroni Correction](bonferroni-correction.Rmd) | `bonferroni-correction` |
| [Bootstrap Confidence Intervals](bootstrap-confidence-intervals.Rmd) | `bootstrap-confidence-intervals` |
| [Chi-Squared Goodness-of-Fit Test](chi-squared-goodness-of-fit.Rmd) | `chi-squared-goodness-of-fit` |
| [Chi-Squared Test of Independence](chi-squared-independence.Rmd) | `chi-squared-independence` |
| [Cochran-Mantel-Haenszel Test](cochran-mantel-haenszel.Rmd) | `cochran-mantel-haenszel` |
| [Effect Sizes: Overview](effect-sizes-overview.Rmd) | `effect-sizes-overview` |
| [Equivalence Testing with TOST](equivalence-tost.Rmd) | `equivalence-tost` |
| [Fisher's Exact Test](fisher-exact-test.Rmd) | `fisher-exact-test` |
| [Friedman Test](friedman-test.Rmd) | `friedman-test` |
| [Holm's Step-Down Correction](holm-correction.Rmd) | `holm-correction` |
| [Kendall's Tau](kendall-tau.Rmd) | `kendall-tau` |
| [Kolmogorov-Smirnov Test](kolmogorov-smirnov-test.Rmd) | `kolmogorov-smirnov-test` |
| [Kruskal-Wallis Test](kruskal-wallis.Rmd) | `kruskal-wallis` |
| [Levene's Test of Variances](levene-test.Rmd) | `levene-test` |
| [Mann-Whitney U Test](mann-whitney-u.Rmd) | `mann-whitney-u` |
| [McNemar's Test](mcnemar-test.Rmd) | `mcnemar-test` |
| [Mixed ANOVA](mixed-anova.Rmd) | `mixed-anova` |
| [Multiple Comparisons: Overview](multiple-comparisons-overview.Rmd) | `multiple-comparisons-overview` |
| [Null and Alternative Hypotheses](null-alternative-hypotheses.Rmd) | `null-alternative-hypotheses` |
| [One-Proportion Test](one-proportion-test.Rmd) | `one-proportion-test` |
| [One-Sample t-Test](one-sample-t-test.Rmd) | `one-sample-t-test` |
| [One-Sample z-Test](one-sample-z-test.Rmd) | `one-sample-z-test` |
| [One-Way ANOVA](one-way-anova.Rmd) | `one-way-anova` |
| [P-Values Explained](p-values-explained.Rmd) | `p-values-explained` |
| [Paired t-Test](paired-t-test.Rmd) | `paired-t-test` |
| [Pearson Correlation Test](pearson-correlation-test.Rmd) | `pearson-correlation-test` |
| [Permutation Tests](permutation-tests.Rmd) | `permutation-tests` |
| [Post-Hoc Tests with Tukey HSD](post-hoc-tests-tukey.Rmd) | `post-hoc-tests-tukey` |
| [Repeated-Measures ANOVA](repeated-measures-anova.Rmd) | `repeated-measures-anova` |
| [Shapiro-Wilk Normality Test](shapiro-wilk-test.Rmd) | `shapiro-wilk-test` |
| [Spearman Rank Correlation Test](spearman-correlation-test.Rmd) | `spearman-correlation-test` |
| [The Bootstrap: Introduction](bootstrap-introduction.Rmd) | `bootstrap-introduction` |
| [The Jackknife](jackknife.Rmd) | `jackknife` |
| [The Runs Test](runs-test.Rmd) | `runs-test` |
| [The Sign Test](sign-test.Rmd) | `sign-test` |
| [Two-Proportion Test](two-proportion-test.Rmd) | `two-proportion-test` |
| [Two-Sample t-Test](two-sample-t-test.Rmd) | `two-sample-t-test` |
| [Two-Way ANOVA](two-way-anova.Rmd) | `two-way-anova` |
| [Type I and Type II Errors](type-i-type-ii-errors.Rmd) | `type-i-type-ii-errors` |
| [Welch's t-Test](welch-t-test.Rmd) | `welch-t-test` |
| [Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test](wilcoxon-signed-rank.Rmd) | `wilcoxon-signed-rank` |

## Labs

| Lab |
|---|
| [Populations, samples, and the central limit theorem](labs/lab-populations-samples-and-the-central-limit-theorem.Rmd) |
| [Bootstrap and permutation tests](labs/lab-bootstrap-and-permutation-tests.Rmd) |
| [Maximum likelihood estimation](labs/lab-maximum-likelihood-estimation.Rmd) |
| [One-sample t-test and one-proportion test](labs/lab-one-sample-t-test-and-one-proportion-test.Rmd) |
| [Hypothesis testing, p-values, type I/II errors](labs/lab-hypothesis-testing-p-values-type-i-ii-errors.Rmd) |
| [Two-sample and paired t-tests](labs/lab-two-sample-and-paired-t-tests.Rmd) |
| [Two proportions, chi-square, risk and odds](labs/lab-two-proportions-chi-square-risk-and-odds.Rmd) |
| [Pearson and Spearman correlation](labs/lab-pearson-and-spearman-correlation.Rmd) |
| [Non-parametric tests](labs/lab-non-parametric-tests.Rmd) |
